tasks.instruction: Uzupelnij tabelke, dobierajac okreslenia (A-L) odpowiadajace danej kategorii. Trzy okreslenia podano dodatkowo i nie pasuja one do zadnej kategorii.

options.text: Children hang stockings by the fireplace
People dress up in costumes and go trick-or-treating
Families pull crackers at the dinner table
People light bonfires and set off fireworks
A roast turkey is the traditional main dish
A figure called the Guy is burned on top of the fire
Hot cross buns are eaten during this holiday
People carve faces into pumpkins and display them
It commemorates the failed Gunpowder Plot of 1605
Children search for chocolate eggs hidden in the garden
The date changes every year as it follows the lunar calendar
It falls on the 5th of November each year
